plot outline: In the Town of Derry, the local kids are disappearing one by one. In a place known as 'The Barrens', a group of seven kids are united by their horrifying and strange encounters with an evil clown and their determination to kill It.
title: It
akas: Rerelease IT Chapter One (Ireland, English title)
It: Part 1 - The Losers' Club (World-wide, English title)
